zh.Glenbervie, Kincardine, Scotland: 蘇格蘭金加迪爾格倫維
zh.lifeSummary: 當Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie於1502年9月7日出生在蘇格蘭金加迪爾格倫維時，他的母親Lady Elizabeth Auchinleck27歲，父親Sir William Douglas of Glenbervie33歲。他於大約1525年與Agnes Keith of Marischal結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1570年9月29日在他的家鄉享年68歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾格倫維。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie于1502年9月7日出生在苏格兰金加迪爾格倫維时，他的母亲Lady Elizabeth Auchinleck27岁，父亲Sir William Douglas of Glenbervie33岁。他于大约1525年与Agnes Keith of Marischal结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1570年9月29日在他的家乡享年68岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾格倫維。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Archibald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

variants.name: Archibold
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

en.lifeSummary: When Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie was born on 7 September 1502, in Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland, his mother, Lady Elizabeth Auchinleck, was 27 and his father, Sir William Douglas of Glenbervie, was 33. He married Agnes Keith of Marischal about 1525. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. He died on 29 September 1570, in his hometown, at the age of 68, and was buried in Glenbervie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie est né le 7 septembre 1502, à Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Écosse, sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Auchinleck, avait 27 ans et son père, Sir William Douglas of Glenbervie, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Keith of Marischal environ 1525. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1570, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Glenbervie, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie am 7. September 1502 in Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Auchinleck 27 und sein Vater Sir William Douglas of Glenbervie 33. Er hat um 1525 Agnes Keith of Marischal geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 29. September 1570 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Glenbervie, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie è nato il il 7 settembre 1502 nel Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland, il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Auchinleck, aveva 27 anni e il suo padre, Sir William Douglas of Glenbervie, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Keith of Marischal circa 1525. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Morì il 29 settembre 1570, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Glenbervie, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervieが1502年9月7日にスコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアグレンバーヴィで生まれた時，母Lady Elizabeth Auchinleckは27歳，父Sir William Douglas of Glenbervieは33歳であった。約1525年にAgnes Keith of Marischalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1570年9月29日に故郷で68歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアグレンバーヴィにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie(이)가 1502년 9월 7일 스컷랜드 킨카딘실르 글렌버비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Auchinleck(은)는 27세였고, 그의 아버지 Sir William Douglas of Glenbervie(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1525년 Agnes Keith of Marischal(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1570년 9월 29일 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 글렌버비에 묻혔다.

pt.1525: de 11 de janeiro de 1525 a 10 de janeiro de 1526
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie nasceu em 7 de setembro de 1502, em Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland, sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Auchinleck, tinha 27 anos e seu pai, Sir William Douglas of Glenbervie, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Keith of Marischal aproximadamente 1525. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1570, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Glenbervie, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie родился 7 сентября 1502 г. в местности гленбирви, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, его матери по имени Lady Elizabeth Auchinleck было 27 лет, а отцу, которого звали Sir William Douglas of Glenbervie, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Keith of Marischal около 1525 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Он умер 29 сентября 1570 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности гленбирви, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Agnes Keith of Marischal aproximadamente 1525. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1570, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Glenbervie, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
